{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/51759549?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/yumarun", "id": 51759549, "login": "yumarun", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjUxNzU5NTQ5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/yumarun", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44966", "cvss": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1321", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')"}], "description": "### Summary
A prototype pollution vulnerability was discovered in Velocity.js <= 2.1.5. This issue occurs during the processing of #set directives in Velocity templates. If an application renders a template controlled by an attacker, it is possible to modify Object.prototype, potentially leading to Denial of Service (DoS) or Remote Code Execution (RCE) depending on the server environment.

### Details
The root cause is located in the #set path assignment logic within the source code:
- File: /src/compile/set.ts 
- Issue: The engine accepts arbitrary path keys and performs assignments using the logic `(baseRef as Record<string, unknown>)[key] = val`.


Because there is no validation or filtering to block sensitive keys such as \_\_proto\_\_, constructor, or prototype, an attacker can traverse the prototype chain and pollute the global Object.prototype.

### PoC
```javascript
const {render} = require('velocityjs');
delete Object.prototype.polluted;
console.log({}.polluted); // ""
render('#set($__proto__.polluted = "hacked")', {});
console.log({}.polluted); // "hacked"
delete Object.prototype.polluted;
```

### Impact
- Vulnerability Type: Prototype Pollution
- Who is impacted: Any application that renders Velocity templates where the template content can be influenced or controlled by untrusted users.
- Severity: High. Prototype pollution can often be used to bypass security controls, cause application crashes (DoS), or be chained with other vulnerabilities to achieve code execution.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00505, "percentile": 0.39505}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j658-c2gf-x6pq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-09T00:40:16Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j658-c2gf-x6pq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j658-c2gf-x6pq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44966"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-26T22:16:43Z", "published_at": "2026-05-09T00:40:16Z", "references": ["https://github.com/shepherdwind/velocity.js/security/advisories/GHSA-j658-c2gf-x6pq", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44966", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j658-c2gf-x6pq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/shepherdwind/velocity.js/security-advisories/GHSA-j658-c2gf-x6pq", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/shepherdwind/velocity.js", "summary": "Velocity.js has a Prototype Pollution vulnerability through #set path assignment", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:35:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j658-c2gf-x6pq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "velocityjs"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.1.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Velocity.js has a Prototype Pollution vulnerability through #set path assignment
